def negative_monolithic_module_owns_parsing_validation_execution_and_rendering():
    rule_id = "monolithic_module_owns_parsing_validation_execution_and_rendering"
    family = "structure"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag modules that contain the whole pipeline and become hard to reason about."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
